name: @roastcodes/ttdash
description: Local-first dashboard and CLI for toktrack usage data

scripts.build: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build:app
scripts.check:deps: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs src shared server server.js usage-normalizer.js
scripts.lint:docstrings: eslint src server.js usage-normalizer.js shared --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.d.ts --cache --cache-location .cache/eslint/docstrings --cache-strategy content
scripts.test:static: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run check:deps && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --project unit --project frontend --project integration --project integration-background --outputFile.junit=./test-results/vitest-main.junit.xml
scripts.test:vitest: npm run test:architecture && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit:coverage: vitest run --coverage --project unit --project frontend --project integration --project integration-background --reporter=dot --reporter=junit --outputFile.junit=./test-results/vitest-coverage.junit.xml
scripts.test:timings: vitest run --project unit --project frontend --project integration --project integration-background --reporter=dot --reporter=junit --outputFile.junit=./test-results/vitest-timings.junit.xml && node scripts/report-test-timings.js ./test-results/vitest-timings.junit.xml
scripts.test:timings:budget: vitest run --project unit --project frontend --project integration --project integration-background --reporter=dot --reporter=junit --outputFile.junit=./test-results/vitest-timing-budget.junit.xml && node scripts/report-test-timings.js ./test-results/vitest-timing-budget.junit.xml --max-suite-seconds=20 --max-test-seconds=12
scripts.deps:graph: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs -T archi src shared server server.js usage-normalizer.js
scripts.verify: npm run test:static && npm run test:vitest && npm run build:app && npm run verify:package
scripts.verify:release: npm run test:static && npm run test:architecture && npm run test:vitest:coverage && npm run build:app && npm run verify:package
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify:release && npm run test:e2e:ci
